<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>桑澤 一郎 | 国際ロータリー第2地域</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Serif+JP:wght@300;400;600&family=Shippori+Mincho:wght@400;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  *,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
  :root{--ink:#1a1818;--ink-mid:#4a3a38;--ink-light:#8a7a78;--rotary:#17458f;--rotary-light:#4a78c4;--rotary-pale:#e8eef8;--gold:#c8a830;--cream:#f6f4f0;--white:#ffffff;--border:#d4cec8}
  body{background:var(--cream);color:var(--ink);font-family:'Noto Serif JP',serif;min-height:100vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;padding:2rem 1rem 3rem}
  .wrapper{width:100%;max-width:420px;animation:fadeUp 0.6s ease both}
  @keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
  .rotary-band{background:var(--rotary);color:white;text-align:center;padding:8px 16px;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:0.18em;border-radius:2px 2px 0 0}
  .header{text-align:center;padding:2rem 1rem 2rem;border:1px solid var(--border);border-top:none;background:var(--white);margin-bottom:1.5rem;border-radius:0 0 2px 2px}
  .avatar{width:88px;height:88px;border-radius:50%;border:3px solid var(--gold);margin:0 auto 1.2rem;overflow:hidden;background:var(--rotary)}
  .avatar img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top}
  .name-ja{font-family:'Shippori Mincho',serif;font-size:26px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.15em;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:4px}
  .name-en{font-size:12px;letter-spacing:0.2em;color:var(--ink-light);margin-bottom:1rem}
  .org{font-size:14px;color:var(--rotary);letter-spacing:0.08em;margin-bottom:6px}
  .title{font-size:11px;color:var(--ink-mid);letter-spacing:0.08em;line-height:1.7;padding:0 1rem}
  .info-block{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:2px;margin-bottom:1rem;overflow:hidden}
  .info-row{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
  .info-row:last-child{border-bottom:none}
  .info-label{font-size:11px;color:var(--ink-light);letter-spacing:0.1em;padding:12px 14px;min-width:72px;border-right:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center}
  .info-value{font-size:13px;color:var(--ink);padding:12px 14px;flex:1;line-height:1.7}
  .info-value a{color:var(--ink);text-decoration:none;border-bottom:1px solid var(--rotary-pale);transition:border-color 0.2s}
  .info-value a:hover{border-color:var(--rotary-light)}
  .save-btn{display:block;width:100%;padding:16px;background:var(--rotary);color:white;border:none;border-radius:2px;font-family:'Noto Serif JP',serif;font-size:14px;letter-spacing:0.15em;cursor:pointer;text-align:center;transition:background 0.2s;margin-top:1.5rem}
  .save-btn:hover{background:#0f3070}
  .save-btn:active{transform:scale(0.99)}
  .save-btn::before{content:'＋';margin-right:8px;color:var(--gold)}
  .footer{text-align:center;margin-top:2rem;font-size:11px;color:var(--ink-light);letter-spacing:0.1em}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="wrapper">
  <div class="rotary-band">ROTARY INTERNATIONAL REGION 2</div>
  <div class="header">
    <div class="avatar"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="桑澤一郎"></div>
    <div class="name-ja">桑澤 一郎</div>
    <div class="name-en">Ichiro Kuwazawa</div>
    <div class="org">国際ロータリー第2地域</div>
    <div class="title">公共イメージコーディネーター<br>行動計画推進リーダー</div>
  </div>
  <div class="info-block">
    <div class="info-row"><span class="info-label">住所</span><span class="info-value">〒390-0811<br>長野県松本市中央1-23-1<br>松本商工会館<br>国際ロータリー第2600地区事務所</span></div>
    <div class="info-row"><span class="info-label">電話</span><span class="info-value"><a href="tel:0263380800">0263-38-0800</a></span></div>
    <div class="info-row"><span class="info-label">携帯</span><span class="info-value"><a href="tel:09060002600">090-6000-2600</a></span></div>
    <div class="info-row"><span class="info-label">メール</span><span class="info-value"><a href="mailto:i.kuwazawa@gmail.com">i.kuwazawa@gmail.com</a></span></div>
    <div class="info-row"><span class="info-label">ウェブ</span><span class="info-value"><a href="https://www.japanrotary.club" target="_blank">www.japanrotary.club</a></span></div>
  </div>
  <div class="info-block">
    <div class="info-row"><span class="info-label">LINE</span><span class="info-value"><a href="https://line.me/ti/p/~kuwazawa">kuwazawa</a></span></div>
    <div class="info-row"><span class="info-label">WhatsApp</span><span class="info-value"><a href="https://wa.me/819060002600">+81 90-6000-2600</a></span></div>
    <div class="info-row"><span class="info-label">Messenger</span><span class="info-value"><a href="https://m.me/i.kuwa">facebook.com/i.kuwa</a></span></div>
  </div>
  <button class="save-btn" onclick="downloadVCard()">連絡先に追加</button>
  <div class="footer">タップで電話・メッセージを直接開けます</div>
</div>
<script>
function downloadVCard(){const v=['BEGIN:VCARD','VERSION:3.0','FN:桑澤 一郎','N:桑澤;一郎;;;','NICKNAME:Ichiro Kuwazawa','ORG:国際ロータリー第2地域','TITLE:公共イメージコーディネーター・行動計画推進リーダー','ADR;TYPE=WORK:;;長野県松本市中央1-23-1 松本商工会館 国際ロータリー第2600地区事務所;;;390-0811;Japan','TEL;TYPE=WORK,VOICE:0263-38-0800','TEL;TYPE=CELL:090-6000-2600','EMAIL:i.kuwazawa@gmail.com','URL:https://www.japanrotary.club','X-SOCIALPROFILE;type=line:https://line.me/ti/p/~kuwazawa','X-SOCIALPROFILE;type=whatsapp:https://wa.me/819060002600','X-SOCIALPROFILE;type=facebook:https://facebook.com/i.kuwa','END:VCARD'].join('\r\n');const b=new Blob([v],{type:'text/vcard;charset=utf-8'});const u=URL.createObjectURL(b);const a=document.createElement('a');a.href=u;a.download='kuwazawa_rotary.vcf';a.click();URL.revokeObjectURL(u)}
</script>
</body>
